---
title: "Proportional Hazards Models"
format:
  html: default
  revealjs:
    output-file: proportional-hazards-models-slides.html
  pdf:
    output-file: proportional-hazards-models-handout.pdf
  docx:
    output-file: proportional-hazards-models-handout.docx

---


{{< include shared-config.qmd >}}

# Introduction

{{< include _subfiles/proportional-hazards-models/_exr-review-exp-dist.qmd >}}

# Understanding proportional hazards models

{{< include _subfiles/proportional-hazards-models/_sec-understand-coxph.qmd >}}

{{< slidebreak >}}

{{< include _subfiles/proportional-hazards-models/_def-risk-score.qmd >}}

# Testing the proportional hazards assumption

{{< include _subfiles/proportional-hazards-models/_sec-test-ph-assumption.qmd >}}

# Fitting proportional hazards models to data

{{< include _subfiles/proportional-hazards-models/_sec_fit-coxph.qmd >}}


# Example: Proportional hazards model for the `bmt` data

{{< include _subfiles/proportional-hazards-models/_sec-exm-coxph-bmt.qmd >}}

# Adjustment for Ties (optional)

{{< include _subfiles/proportional-hazards-models/_sec_coxph-adjust_ties.qmd >}}

# Building Cox Proportional Hazards Models

{{< include coxph-model-building.qmd >}}

# Competing Risks

{{< include _subfiles/proportional-hazards-models/_sec-competing-risks.qmd >}}

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
